title: Migrating session store from in-memory to Redis
reasoning: In-memory sessions die on restart; pin to one instance. Redis = shared, restart-safe.
feature_flag_strategy: Ship behind a reversible flag with owner, expiry date, cohort targeting, metrics, and an emergency disable path exercised before rollout.

title: Replacing Mocha with Vitest
reasoning: API similar; assertions via expect (Vitest) vs assert/chai (Mocha). Convert per file.
feature_flag_strategy: Ship behind a reversible flag with owner, expiry date, cohort targeting, metrics, and an emergency disable path exercised before rollout.
solution:
-- Replacing Mocha with Vitest
-- Phase 1: add compatible structure without changing reads.
ALTER TABLE target_table ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS new_value TEXT;

-- Phase 2: backfill in bounded chunks with progress tracking.
UPDATE target_table
SET new_value = legacy_value
WHERE new_value IS NULL
  AND id IN (SELECT id FROM target_table WHERE new_value IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 1000);

-- Phase 3: dual-read/dual-write in app code, compare counts, then cut over.
-- Phase 4: remove legacy path only after telemetry shows zero legacy reads for one full release window.

-- Rollback: keep legacy column/path until validation passes; disable new writes with a feature flag.

title: Migrating from CRON to scheduled k8s jobs
reasoning: K8s CronJob: backoffLimit, history, suspend.
feature_flag_strategy: Per-job
solution:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata: {name: nightly-rollup}
spec:
  schedule: "0 2 * * *"
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      backoffLimit: 2
      template:
        spec:
          containers: [{name: rollup, image: app:latest, command: ["node","scripts/rollup.js"]}]
          restartPolicy: OnFailure

title: Migrating from per-row encryption to envelope

current_state.description: Each row encrypted with master key

target_state.description: Envelope (DEK per row, KEK in KMS)

reasoning: Envelope: DEK encrypted with KEK; rotate KEK, re-wrap DEKs.
feature_flag_strategy: Ship behind a reversible flag with owner, expiry date, cohort targeting, metrics, and an emergency disable path exercised before rollout.
